title: AMD Matrix Cores
preview: Technical overview of AMD CDNA Matrix Core units enabling high-throughput mixed-precision GEMM for AI workloads.
summary: Describes the Matrix Core architecture in AMD CDNA GPUs, covering how the hardware executes MFMA (Matrix Fused Multiply-Add) instructions at different precisions (FP64, FP32, FP16, BF16, INT8). Explains pipeline depth, register file layout, and the relationship between occupancy and throughput.
datacenter: Directly relevant to AI training and inference cluster evaluation. Matrix Core throughput in TFLOPS and the precision support matrix determine which ML frameworks and model types run efficiently on MI200/MI300 nodes.
metrics: Key result signal: peak FP16 Matrix Core throughput in TFLOPS per CU and scaling to full GPU die.
